calendar.matters:
Motion For Determination Of Prevailing Party & Order Awarding Reasonable Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Jan-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff. APPEARANCES: Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq., for the plaintiff; no appearance by or for the defendant. The court finds that plaintiff is the prevailing party and awards plaintiff's counsel $3,167.50 in attorney fees. Order signed and filed this date.

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Continued To Oct-08-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 210

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Maureen Howard. Plaintiff was represented by Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. and Defendant appeared in pro per. Case did not settle and remains on the trial calendar.
